testCases.title: File existence and correct naming at the project root
testCases.description: Verify that dummy.md exists at the project root.
tracesTo: plan.md Stage 1 Success Criteria: File exists at project root as `dummy.md`

testCases.title: Presence of the correct H1 title
testCases.description: Verify that dummy.md contains the correct H1 title '# Dummy'.
tracesTo: plan.md Stage 1 Success Criteria: Contains H1 title: "# Dummy"

testCases.title: Presence of the Purpose section
testCases.description: Verify that dummy.md includes the Purpose section.
tracesTo: plan.md Stage 1 Success Criteria: Includes Purpose section

testCases.title: Presence of the Structure section
testCases.description: Verify that dummy.md includes the Structure section.
tracesTo: plan.md Stage 1 Success Criteria: Includes Structure section

testCases.title: Presence of the Next Steps section
testCases.description: Verify that dummy.md includes the Next Steps section.
tracesTo: plan.md Stage 1 Success Criteria: Includes Next Steps section

testCases.title: Content of the Purpose section explains placeholder role
testCases.description: Verify that the Purpose section explicitly mentions placeholder, documentation pipeline, or scaffold.
tracesTo: specification.md Content Structure: Brief explanation of the file's role in the documentation pipeline

testCases.title: Content of the Structure section describes conventions
testCases.description: Verify that the Structure section mentions markdown conventions, heading hierarchy, or documentation organization.
tracesTo: specification.md Content Structure: Overview of expected markdown conventions

testCases.title: Content of the Next Steps section provides replacement guidance
testCases.description: Verify that the Next Steps section instructs the user to replace the placeholder content.
tracesTo: specification.md Content Structure: Guidance indicating where actual content would replace this placeholder

testCases.title: File length is within the maximum allowed limit
testCases.description: Verify that the file length is strictly less than 50 lines.
tracesTo: plan.md Stage 1 Success Criteria: File is under 50 lines total

testCases.title: Empty lines and whitespace handling at the end of the file
testCases.description: Verify that the file ends with a single newline character and no excessive trailing blank lines.
tracesTo: specification.md Conventions Applied: GitHub Flavored Markdown

testCases.title: Case sensitivity of the filename
testCases.description: Verify that the file was not created with uppercase letters.
tracesTo: specification.md Location and Scope: `dummy.md` lowercase, lowercase filename convention
